classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V8.4.0 after the visual operating system and workflow corridor passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V8.4.0 is the stable release for visual operating system and workflow corridor.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted Visual operating system and workflow corridor in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep private self-hosting work outside PM product workspaces and promote only reusable repo surfaces.
